title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Continue, Cancel
scenario: Guest user who completed onboarding navigates to Support, clicks App, then Login, and after clicking Cancel on the login dialog, is returned to the Support App section with the Later/Login modal still present.
steps: User who went through onboarding as a Guest navigates to Support via the hamburger menu.
A login dialog with Cancel and Continue buttons appears.
User clicks Continue — the login page opens.
User goes back and clicks Cancel (upper left corner).
expected: Clicking Cancel returns the user to the Poly Support App section with the Later/Login modal still present.
